name: Island Brew Coffeehouse
tagline: Hawaii-grown coffee in an open-air lanai setting right on the Ala Moana waterfront.
mustOrder: Hawaiian honey latte — local honey and Waialua coffee
cold brew on nitro — smooth and creamy
parking: Ala Moana Center parking garage, free for 4 hours
talkStory: Locally owned and committed to sourcing exclusively from Hawaiian farms — Waialua, Kona, Ka’u, and Maui estates rotate through the menu seasonally. The open-air lanai seating overlooks Ala Moana Beach Park, and when the trade winds blow through it’s one of the most pleasant coffee spots on the island. The Hawaiian honey latte uses raw honey from Big Island apiaries. Way more relaxed than the Ala Moana food court upstairs, and the coffee is leagues better than any chain in the mall.
